sprints.name: Core Engine
sprints.theme: Game loop, canvas rendering, tile system, physics, camera with parallax scrolling

sprints.name: Player Character
sprints.theme: Full movement vocabulary, combat mechanics, and animated Canvas-drawn sprite

sprints.name: Game Structure & UI
sprints.theme: State machine, title screen, pause menu, HUD, game over, and screen transitions

sprints.name: World Map & Progression
sprints.theme: Top-down world map, stage selection, save/load, collectible tracking

sprints.name: Enemy & Boss Framework + World 1: Whispering Forest
sprints.theme: Enemy AI framework, boss fight system, and all 3 Forest stages with enemies, puzzles, and bosses

sprints.name: World 2: Scorching Desert
sprints.theme: Desert stages with quicksand, dark rooms, water/swimming physics, mirror puzzles, and 3 unique bosses

sprints.name: World 3: Frozen Tundra
sprints.theme: Tundra stages with ice physics, auto-scrolling, aurora backgrounds, and 3 unique bosses

sprints.name: World 4: Molten Volcano
sprints.theme: Volcano stages with lava hazards, chain-swinging, steam vents, multi-phase dragon boss

sprints.name: The Citadel & Final Boss
sprints.theme: Final remix stage combining all worlds, 5-phase final boss, victory screen with stats

sprints.name: Audio System
sprints.theme: Synthesized sound effects, per-world ambient audio, dynamic boss percussion

sprints.name: Visual Effects & Polish
sprints.theme: Particles, screen shake, hit flash, death animation, boss defeat slow-mo, iris-wipe transitions

sprints.name: Integration, Balance & Performance
sprints.theme: 60fps optimization, game feel verification, full playthrough validation, bug fixes
features: All features — integration and polish pass

sprints.name: Playability Validator — Path Validation Engine
sprints.theme: BFS pathfinding engine, debug mode UI, window.runPlayabilityCheck() API, per-stage path validation

sprints.name: Arena Validation & Difficulty Parameter Checks
sprints.theme: Boss arena enclosure validation, difficulty table compliance checks, complete validation report
features: F24: Playability Validator System (arena validation + difficulty parameters)

sprints.name: Level Layout Fixes & Boss Rebalancing
sprints.theme: Fix broken stages (1-1, 1-2), tune all boss vulnerability windows and HP to difficulty curve
features: F25: Difficulty Curve Rebalancing (level fixes + boss tuning)

sprints.name: Enemy & Hazard Rebalancing + Full Validation Pass
sprints.theme: Enemy density caps, hazard percentage limits, platform width enforcement, full validation sweep
features: F24 + F25: Integration validation — all 13 stages PASS
